recommendations.title: Dead Sea
recommendations.overview: Stranded in the open sea after a fatal accident, a young woman and her two friends are rescued by a fishing vessel's captain, unaware that the ship harbors a chilling secret.

recommendations.title: Haunting of the Queen Mary

recommendations.title: Pressure
recommendations.overview: Four divers are stuck deep underwater in a vessel after a freak storm destroys their ship. Will they survive?

recommendations.title: Death Ship
recommendations.overview: Survivors of a tragic shipping collision are rescued by a mysterious black ship which appears out of the fog. Little do they realise that the ship is actually a Nazi torture ship which has sailed the seas for years, luring unsuspecting sailors aboard

recommendations.title: Sleepaway Camp
recommendations.overview: Years after a terrible boating accident, Angela is sent to Camp Arawak where a series of bizarre and violent "accidents" begin to claim the lives of various campers.

recommendations.title: Smile
recommendations.overview: After witnessing a bizarre, traumatic incident involving a patient, Dr. Rose Cotter starts experiencing frightening occurrences that she can't explain.

recommendations.title: Bitter Moon
recommendations.overview: A passenger on a cruise ship develops an irresistible infatuation with an eccentric paraplegic's wife.

recommendations.title: Titanic 666

recommendations.title: Dark Light
recommendations.overview: A woman returns to her family home and discovers it to be inhabited by monsters.

recommendations.title: The Skeptic
